parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
return [{
  json: {
    requestid: input.requestid,
    sessionid: input.sessionid,
    fileid: input.fileid,
    mode: input.mode,
    stage: input.stage,
    timestamp: input.timestamp,
    ingestversion: input.ingestversion,
    source_type: input.source_type,
    file_type: input.file_type,
    logid: input.logid,
    toolname: input.toolname,
    verilogfiles: input.verilogfiles,
    logcontent: input.logcontent,
    rtlcontent: input.rtlcontent,
    context: input.context,
    startms: input.startms
  }
}];

const parser = $('Process - EDA Log Parser').first().json;
const meta = $('Process - Extract Metadata').first().json;
const chunks = parser.chunks || [];
return chunks.map((chunk, index) => ({
  json: {
    requestid: meta.requestid,
    sessionid: meta.sessionid,
    fileid: meta.fileid,
    mode: meta.mode,
    stage: meta.stage,
    timestamp: meta.timestamp,
    ingestversion: meta.ingestversion,
    startms: meta.startms,
    source_type: meta.source_type,
    file_type: meta.file_type,
    logid: meta.logid,
    toolname: meta.toolname,
    verilogfiles: meta.verilogfiles,
    parsertotallines: parser.totallines,
    parsererrorcount: parser.errorcount,
    parserwarningcount: parser.warningcount,
    parsertimingviolations: parser.timingviolations,
    parserchunkcount: chunks.length,
    chunkindex: index + 1,
    chunk_id: `${meta.logid}-chunk-${index + 1}`,
    filepath: `${meta.logid}-${chunk.metadata.severity}-L${chunk.metadata.linenum}.txt`,
    text: `logid=${meta.logid} tool=${chunk.metadata.tool} severity=${chunk.metadata.severity} ${chunk.text}`,
    rawtext: chunk.text,
    metadata: chunk.metadata,
    priority: chunk.priority
  }
}));

parameters.subject: =AgenticEDAIngest {{$("Process - Build Error Response").first().json.error.code}} log {{$("Process - Build Error Response").first().json.subjectid}}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO eda_files (
  file_id, session_id, logid, file_name, file_type, source_type, toolname, content_hash, storage_uri, metadata
)
VALUES (
  '{{$("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.fileid}}',
  '{{$("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.sessionid}}',
  '{{$("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.subjectid}}',
  '{{$("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.subjectid}}.log',
  '.log',
  'eda_log',
  '{{$("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.details.toolname}}',
  md5('{{$("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.subjectid}}-{{$("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.requestid}}'),
  'lightrag://{{$("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.subjectid}}.log',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    verilogfiles: $("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.details.verilogfiles || [],
    ingestversion: $("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.details.ingestversion
  }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (file_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  session_id = EXCLUDED.session_id,
  logid = EXCLUDED.logid,
  file_name = EXCLUDED.file_name,
  file_type = EXCLUDED.file_type,
  source_type = EXCLUDED.source_type,
  toolname = EXCLUDED.toolname,
  content_hash = EXCLUDED.content_hash,
  storage_uri = EXCLUDED.storage_uri,
  metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata;

INSERT INTO eda_sessions (
  session_id, logid, requestid, toolname, source_type, status, ingestversion,
  topseverity, primaryissuetype, primarylocation, totallines, errorcount,
  warningcount, timingviolations, chunkcount, metadata
)
VALUES (
  '{{$json.sessionid}}',
  '{{$json.subjectid}}',
  '{{$json.requestid}}',
  '{{$json.details.toolname}}',
  'eda_log',
  'indexed',
  '{{$json.details.ingestversion}}',
  '{{$json.summary.severity}}',
  '{{$json.details.parsersummary.primaryissuetype}}',
  '{{$json.summary.primarylocation}}',
  {{$json.metrics.totallines || 0}},
  {{$json.metrics.errorcount || 0}},
  {{$json.metrics.warningcount || 0}},
  {{$json.metrics.timingviolations || 0}},
  {{$json.metrics.chunkcount || 0}},
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ verilogfiles: $json.details.verilogfiles, uploadsummary: $json.details.uploadsummary }) }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (logid)
DO UPDATE SET
  requestid = EXCLUDED.requestid,
  toolname = EXCLUDED.toolname,
  source_type = EXCLUDED.source_type,
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  ingestversion = EXCLUDED.ingestversion,
  topseverity = EXCLUDED.topseverity,
  primaryissuetype = EXCLUDED.primaryissuetype,
  primarylocation = EXCLUDED.primarylocation,
  totallines = EXCLUDED.totallines,
  errorcount = EXCLUDED.errorcount,
  warningcount = EXCLUDED.warningcount,
  timingviolations = EXCLUDED.timingviolations,
  chunkcount = EXCLUDED.chunkcount,
  metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata,
  updatedat = NOW();

INSERT INTO workflow_audit_logs (
  requestid, workflow_name, stage, status, error_code, retryable, latencyms, metadata
)
VALUES (
  '{{$("Process - Build Error Response").first().json.requestid}}',
  '0422-AgenticEDA - Log Ingest Pipeline v2',
  '{{$("Process - Build Error Response").first().json.error.stage}}',
  'ERROR',
  '{{$("Process - Build Error Response").first().json.error.code}}',
  {{$("Process - Build Error Response").first().json.error.retryable ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE'}},
  {{$("Process - Build Error Response").first().json.metrics.latencyms || 0}},
  '{{$("Process - Build Error Response").first().json ? JSON.stringify({
    subjectid: $("Process - Build Error Response").first().json.subjectid,
    sessionid: $("Process - Build Error Response").first().json.sessionid,
    fileid: $("Process - Build Error Response").first().json.fileid,
    message: $("Process - Build Error Response").first().json.error.message
  }).replace(/'/g, "''") : "{}"}}'::jsonb
);

INSERT INTO workflow_audit_logs (
  requestid, workflow_name, stage, status, error_code, retryable, latencyms, metadata
)
VALUES (
  '{{$("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.requestid}}',
  '0422-AgenticEDA - Log Ingest Pipeline v2',
  '{{$("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.stage}}',
  'SUCCESS',
  NULL,
  FALSE,
  {{$("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.metrics.latencyms || 0}},
  '{{$("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json ? JSON.stringify({
    subjectid: $("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.subjectid,
    sessionid: $("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.sessionid,
    fileid: $("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.fileid,
    uploadsummary: $("Process - Build Phase 1 Ingest Response").first().json.details.uploadsummary
  }).replace(/'/g, "''") : "{}"}}'::jsonb
);
